title: pgrls configuration
description: Configuration file (pgrls.toml) for pgrls, the Postgres Row-Level Security linter. Rule reference: https://github.com/pgrls/pgrls/blob/main/AGENTS.md

extends.description: Path, or list of paths, to base pgrls.toml file(s) merged beneath this one. Later list entries and this file's own keys take precedence.

url.description: Postgres connection string. $VAR and ${VAR} are interpolated from the environment. Prefer leaving this unset and passing --database-url (or $DATABASE_URL) at runtime so secrets stay out of version control.

fail_on.description: Severity that makes `pgrls lint` exit non-zero. CI gates on this.

disable.description: Rule IDs to disable entirely (case-insensitive), e.g. ["SEC022", "PERF002"].

rules.description: Per-rule settings, keyed by rule ID — e.g. a [lint.rules.SEC001] table.

fail_on.description: Change classification at or above which `pgrls diff` exits non-zero.

severity.description: Remap this rule's emitted severity without disabling it (promote an info nudge to a CI-blocking error, or demote a noisy warning).

allowlist.description: Objects exempt from this rule. Entry shape depends on the rule: a policy ID (schema.table.policy), a table reference (table or schema.table), a role name, a qualified view/function, etc.
